note: Sample seed data for development only. In production this file is replaced by the curated feed published by the ingestion pipeline. Items below are illustrative, not authoritative.

updates.title: Revised Digital Lending Guidelines issued
updates.summary: Updated rules on default loss guarantee (DLG) caps and disclosures for Lending Service Providers. Relevant to digital-lending and fintech topics.

updates.title: CAIIB November 2026 registration window opens
updates.summary: Online registration for the CAIIB November 2026 attempt is now open. Check eligibility and exam-centre options before the last date.

updates.title: MPC keeps the policy repo rate unchanged at 6.50%
updates.summary: The Monetary Policy Committee retained the repo rate at 6.50% and continued its stance on withdrawal of accommodation. Relevant to monetary-policy and interest-rate questions.

updates.title: Tighter disclosure norms for mutual fund expense ratios
updates.summary: Revised disclosure expectations on total expense ratio (TER) and commissions. Useful background for retail investment-product topics.

updates.title: Amendment to the Master Direction on KYC
updates.summary: Updated periodic-KYC and customer due-diligence timelines. Affects KYC/AML topics in JAIIB Principles & Practices of Banking.

updates.title: New CAIIB elective on Climate Risk & Sustainable Finance
updates.summary: IIBF added an elective covering climate-risk management and green finance. Relevant for candidates choosing CAIIB electives.

updates.title: Revised transaction limits for certain UPI payments
updates.summary: Higher per-transaction limits announced for specified UPI use-cases. Relevant to payment-systems and digital-banking topics.

updates.title: Final guidelines on the Expected Credit Loss (ECL) framework
updates.summary: Forward-looking, expected-loss-based provisioning for banks with a phased transition. Core to credit-risk and provisioning topics in CAIIB.

updates.title: Guidance on bancassurance distribution practices
updates.summary: Guidance on conduct and disclosures for banks distributing insurance. Relevant to the bancassurance section in CAIIB electives.

updates.title: T+0 settlement extended to the top 500 stocks
updates.summary: Same-day settlement widened from the pilot set to the top 500 stocks. Relevant to capital-markets and settlement-cycle topics.

updates.title: Revised Priority Sector Lending classification for renewables
updates.summary: Expanded PSL eligibility for renewable-energy and storage projects. Relevant to NABARD/PSL topics in the Rural elective.

updates.title: Bima Sugam insurance marketplace — go-live update
updates.summary: Phased rollout of the unified insurance marketplace for buying and servicing policies. Background for insurance-distribution topics.

updates.title: JAIIB May 2026 results declared
updates.summary: Results for the JAIIB May 2026 attempt are out on the IIBF portal. Check the score card and re-attempt windows if needed.

updates.title: Master Directions on Fraud Risk Management revised
updates.summary: Updated framework for early detection, reporting and governance of frauds, including timelines and board oversight. Core to risk-and-compliance topics.

updates.title: New nomination rules for demat and MF accounts
updates.summary: Revised nomination and joint-holding norms, including opt-out declarations. Useful for investor-services topics.

updates.title: Liberalised Remittance Scheme — reporting changes
updates.summary: Revised reporting and authorised-dealer obligations under the LRS. Relevant to forex and external-sector topics.

updates.title: Revised surrender-value norms for life policies
updates.summary: Higher special surrender values for early exits from life-insurance policies. Relevant to insurance-product topics.

updates.title: FY27 monetary policy stance turns neutral
updates.summary: The MPC shifted its stance to 'neutral', signalling data-dependent rate decisions ahead. Relevant to monetary-policy framework topics.

updates.title: ASBA-like blocked-amount facility for secondary trading
updates.summary: Optional facility to keep funds blocked in the bank account (UPI mandate) while trading in the secondary market. Relevant to markets-infrastructure topics.

updates.title: Basel III endgame — implementation timeline
updates.summary: Indicative timelines for revised capital and output-floor norms. Core to capital-adequacy topics in CAIIB Bank Financial Management.

updates.title: Revised syllabus for the Certified Credit Professional course
updates.summary: Updated syllabus and reading material for the CCP certification. Relevant for candidates planning specialised certifications.
